history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man in a school uniform, consisting of a white shirt, blue tie, and black vest, sits on a wooden chair in front of a large, stacked arrangement of identical wooden school chairs. The man has dark, curly hair and is looking at the camera with a slight smile. He is wearing light blue pants and white sneakers with green accents.

The background is an imposing wall of wooden school chairs, stacked in rows and columns, creating a textured and somewhat chaotic pattern. Some of the chairs have writing or drawings etched into them. Above the chairs, a large, abstract mural or banner is visible, featuring bold white and blue shapes that resemble mountains and clouds.

The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting soft shadows and highlighting the worn textures of the wood. The color palette is dominated by earthy browns and the vibrant blue of the man's pants and the background mural, with pops of white and green from his uniform and shoes.

The overall mood is casual and youthful, with a hint of nostalgia associated with school settings. The composition is centered on the young man, with the stacked chairs providing a unique and visually interesting backdrop. The image has a slightly gritty, realistic feel, possibly due to the worn condition of the chairs and the outdoor setting.
